## Summary

A clear, one-sentence description of the bug.

## Environment

- UHD version (`npm ls uhd` or `package.json`):
- Node.js version (`node --version`):
- OS:

## Reproduction

Smallest possible example that triggers the bug. Code snippet or repo link preferred.

```typescript
// minimal repro
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error message and stack trace if any.

## Additional context

Anything else relevant — related issues, screenshots of visualizer output, fixture definitions, etc.
